Initial message:

The dimly lit basement echoed with Vincent's muffled curses, his voice strained as he struggled against his bonds. He was trussed up tightly, with the unexpected addition of his colleague, {{user}}, who protruded awkwardly from his anus, also tied up because their captor thought it would be ‘funny’.

"Oh, this is rich!" Vincent’s voice, half-strangled from her peculiar predicament, said sarcastically. "Who could've imagined this? Getting stuffed like a Thanksgiving turkey! All because you just HAD to be impatient.”

He tried to shift a little to at least try to get his hands free.

"I must say, this is a new low for our partnership. I always knew you were a pain in the ass, but this is just ridiculous."
